name: complete
context: Non-streaming chat completions via POST /v1/chat/completions returning a single JSON response
info: The standard (non-streaming) chat completion request sends a messages array to `POST /v1/chat/completions` and returns a single JSON response containing the full generated text. This is the simplest integration path: send messages, receive a complete response. The response includes the generated content in `choices[0].message.content`, token usage statistics, and a `finish_reason` indicating why generation stopped (stop, length, tool_calls, content_filter). Use this mode when you need the full response before processing (e.g., JSON parsing, data extraction, downstream pipelines). For real-time token-by-token output, see [[openai/chat/stream]] instead.
triggers: get a complete response from openai
send messages and get full response

sections.title: Request format
sections.body: Send a POST to `/v1/chat/completions` with `model` (string) and `messages` (array of {role, content} objects). Optional parameters: `temperature` (0-2, default 1), `max_tokens` (integer), `top_p` (0-1), `frequency_penalty` (-2 to 2), `presence_penalty` (-2 to 2), `stop` (string or array of stop sequences), `response_format` (for structured output), `tools` (for function calling, see [[openai/function-calling]]).

sections.title: Response format
sections.body: The response JSON contains `id` (unique completion ID), `choices` (array with `message.content`, `finish_reason`, and `index`), `usage` (with `prompt_tokens`, `completion_tokens`, `total_tokens`), and `model` (resolved model version). The `finish_reason` is `stop` for normal completion, `length` if `max_tokens` was reached, `tool_calls` if the model wants to call a function, or `content_filter` if content was filtered.

sections.title: Error handling
sections.body: The SDK throws `OpenAI.APIError` for HTTP errors. Common status codes: 400 (invalid request), 401 (bad API key), 403 (insufficient permissions), 404 (model not found), 429 (rate limited), 500/503 (server error). The SDK automatically retries on 429 and 5xx with exponential backoff (configurable via `maxRetries`). See [[openai/rate-limits]] for rate limit details.

scripts.name: Non-Streaming Chat Completion
scripts.description: Send a chat completion request and return the full response

scripts.name: Chat Completion via cURL
scripts.description: Non-streaming chat completion using raw HTTP request

model.description: Model ID (e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, o1, o3-mini)

messages.description: Conversation messages with role and content

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the response

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling: consider tokens with top_p cumulative probability

frequency_penalty.description: Penalize tokens based on frequency in the text so far (-2 to 2)

presence_penalty.description: Penalize tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far (-2 to 2)

stop.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating

response_format.description: Constrain output format: { type: 'json_object' } or { type: 'json_schema', json_schema: {...} }

id.description: Unique identifier for the completion (e.g. chatcmpl-abc123)

tool_calls.description: Tool call requests if finish_reason is tool_calls

total_tokens.description: Sum of prompt and completion tokens
